prereg.purpose: Day-8 THIRD external axis: clinical-trial OUTCOME DIRECTION (did drugs against the gene SUCCEED or FAIL in autoimmune indications?) vs the committed binary GO/WITHHELD gate. Distinct from day6/day7 (drug EXISTENCE) — existence is weak; direction asks whether the gate separates targets whose drugs WORKED from those whose drugs FAILED.
prereg.gate_definition: THE committed gate = commit_gate.CommitGate.evaluate (default-deny): GO iff leakage-clean AND genetic_association>=0.20 AND trust>=0.50 AND celltype_matched_eqtl present AND eqtl_direction not inconsistent. Applied to the 98-gene eligible universe: reproduced faithfully as GO iff ot_t1d>=0.20 AND eqtl_nsig>0 (all 98 clear the GA floor; trust asserted non-binding; leakage-clean by construction). Reproduction => 49 GO / 49 WITHHELD, matching the prior committed run exactly. NOT a surrogate.
prereg.real_gate_universe_split: 49 GO / 49 WITHHELD over 98 genes (reproduced, eqtl_nsig via EBI eQTL Catalogue v2, 11 T-cell datasets, nlog10p>=5.0).

outcome_label_rule.SUCCESS: gene is mechanistic target of >=1 drug APPROVED or Phase-III-advanced in an autoimmune indication (OT maximumClinicalStage in {APPROVAL, PHASE_3}).
outcome_label_rule.FAILURE_strict: gene is mechanistic target of a drug that FAILED for efficacy in an autoimmune indication in a controlled trial, with NO approved drug for that target in autoimmune. A terminated INDIVIDUAL trial (funding/recruitment/business) does NOT count; efficacy failure at the program/target level does.
outcome_label_rule.FAILURE_borderline: program stalled / did not advance but with mixed or positive early-phase signals => sensitivity tier only, NOT clean.
outcome_label_rule.NOT_SCORED: no autoimmune drug program => belongs to the EXISTENCE axis (day6), excluded from the DIRECTION axis.

prereg.primary_metric: gate confusion table + Matthews correlation + Fisher exact one-sided p (gate GO enriched among SUCCESS). AUROC reported but flagged meaningless at this n.
prereg.power_note_PREREGISTERED: This axis is EXPECTED to be underpowered: among 98 gate-scored genes only 7 have genuine autoimmune drug SUCCESS and clean documented FAILURES are near-absent (recombinant-agonist / DNAzyme failures are rare). If the FAILURE class is n<=1 clean, we will report UNDERPOWERED and refuse to claim a win, per the honesty contract.
prereg.honesty_contract: Labels + evidence hash-frozen BEFORE scoring. No tuning. Direction reported plainly incl. the gate's own false negatives (successes it WITHHELD). Real committed gate only, never a proxy.

CD3E.evidence: Teplizumab (anti-CD3E) FDA-approved 2022 to delay T1D onset; multiple approved anti-CD3 (muromonab, blinatumomab). maxStage=APPROVAL.

CD52.evidence: Alemtuzumab (anti-CD52) approved for relapsing multiple sclerosis. maxStage=APPROVAL.

CD6.evidence: Itolizumab (anti-CD6) approved (India, plaque psoriasis) / Phase III SLE & aGVHD. maxStage=PHASE_3.

FKBP1A.evidence: Tacrolimus/sirolimus/pimecrolimus (FKBP1A binders) approved immunosuppressants (transplant, atopic dermatitis, psoriasis). maxStage=APPROVAL.

IL2RB.evidence: Basiliximab/daclizumab (anti-IL2R) approved (transplant rejection; daclizumab was approved for MS). maxStage=APPROVAL.

PPIA.evidence: Cyclosporine (cyclophilin/PPIA binder) approved for RA, psoriasis, atopic dermatitis. maxStage=APPROVAL.

TNF.evidence: Adalimumab/etanercept/infliximab (anti-TNF) approved across RA, IBD, psoriasis — cornerstone autoimmune therapy. maxStage=APPROVAL.

IL10.evidence: Recombinant human IL-10 (ilodecakin/tenovil) failed in large placebo-controlled RCTs in Crohn's disease and RA (no efficacy; dose-dependent anemia, PMID 12165551 n=329); no approved autoimmune drug for the target.

IL7R.evidence: Anti-IL7R programs: RN168/PF T1D stopped at Phase 1 (NCT02038764); OSE-127/lusvertikimab UC Phase 2 completed (later mixed/positive). No approved autoimmune drug for the target; net program non-advancement, but NOT an unambiguous efficacy failure.

GATA3.evidence: SB010 (GATA3 DNAzyme) showed a POSITIVE Phase 2a asthma signal (Krug NEJM 2015, PMID 25981191); SB012 UC did not advance. No approved drug; borderline — early positive signal means this is NOT a clean failure.
